source: Superagent daily pull for Explore Omaha Online

events.event_name: Heroes & Villains: The Art of the Disney Costume
events.location: The Durham Museum, 801 South 10th Street, Omaha, NE
events.description: Step into the magic of Disney and discover iconic looks from favorite Disney characters. Nearly 70 mesmerizing ensembles spanning five decades of Disney film and television.

events.event_name: Disney's Mary Poppins - Hawks Mainstage Theatre
events.location: Hawks Mainstage Theatre, 6915 Cass St, Omaha, NE
events.description: The beloved story of the practically perfect nanny! Dazzling choreography, unforgettable songs, and a heartwarming tale the whole family will love.

events.event_name: Dinosaurs Around the World: Passport to Pangea
events.location: Lauritzen Gardens, 100 Bancroft Street, Omaha, NE
events.description: Life-sized animatronic dinosaurs roar and move through the gardens. An immersive prehistoric adventure kids absolutely love.

events.event_name: Strawberry Festival at Nelson Produce Farm
events.location: Nelson Produce Farm, 10505 N 234 St, Valley, NE
events.description: Celebrate the start of summer! Packed with fun activities for all ages centered around strawberries. A wonderful wholesome family outing.

events.location: City Park, 84th and Lincoln, Papillion, NE
events.description: Dating back to 1947! Parade, fireworks show, carnival & market over Father's Day weekend. A beloved community tradition.

events.event_name: Marcus Summer Movies: Charlie the Wonderdog
events.description: Family movie series all summer long at Marcus Theaters — only $3 per ticket. A different family favorite each week through August 13.

events.event_name: Rainforest Falls VBS - King of Kings Church
events.location: King of Kings Church, Northwest Omaha, NE
events.description: Vacation Bible School — a week of faith, fun, and friendship as kids discover who God is and what it means to be rooted in Him. Great for families!

events.event_name: Father's Day Experience - StoneBridge Christian Church
events.description: Special Father's Day Experience service at StoneBridge Christian Church. A wonderful way to celebrate dads and family together in faith.

events.location: Milton R. Abrahams Branch Library, 5111 N 90th St, Omaha, NE
events.description: Hands-on STEM learning about dinosaurs! Kids learn about types of dinosaurs and how fossils were made. Drop-in family friendly event.

events.event_name: Out & About Storytime: Joslyn Castle & Gardens
events.location: Joslyn Castle & Gardens, 3902 Davenport St., Omaha, NE
events.description: Storytime and wildlife adventure in the enchanted gardens. Stories, creative movement, music and live wildlife interactions. This month: snakes!

events.event_name: Outdoor Concerts at The Oasis: Chicago Invasion
events.location: Lauritzen Gardens Amphitheater, 100 Bancroft Street, Omaha, NE
events.description: Live outdoor concert surrounded by beautiful gardens. A new amphitheater debut — music, nature, and community in one unforgettable family evening.

events.location: The Rose Theater, 2001 Farnam Street, Omaha, NE
events.description: Join Anna, Elsa, Olaf and Sven in this beloved musical. Perfect for families with young kids who love Frozen!
